infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need your location to track deliveries.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: We need your location to track deliveries in the background.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: We need camera access to take photos of goods.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: We need photo library access to upload photos of goods.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Tasman Transport to use your location for delivery tracking.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Tasman Transport to access your camera for taking photos of goods.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Tasman Transport to access your photos for uploading images of goods.
